title: Nutty Thai Gelatine Leaf Stir-fry
description: A dense and nutty one-pot Thai dish featuring gelatin leafs in a flavorful sauce that is halal-friendly.
instructions: Soak the gelatine leaves in hot water for at least 5 minutes, then squeeze out excess water.
In a pan, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add minced ginger and garlic; stir-fry until fragrant and golden brown.
Add cashews, carrots, and scallions to the pan. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes or until vegetables are slightly soft.
Combine soy sauce, lime juice, cornstarch, and water in a small bowl. Mix well and pour into the pan with vegetables.
Simmer for an additional minute to thicken the sauce. Remove from heat once everything is evenly coated and heated through.
Garnish with more scallions if desired.
